name: @simplehost/control

scripts.clean: pnpm clean:shared && pnpm clean:api && pnpm clean:web && pnpm clean:entrypoint
scripts.check:preflight: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm preflight && pnpm test:preflight
scripts.check:release-candidate: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm release-candidate && pnpm test:release-candidate
scripts.check:release-sandbox:promotion-ready: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm promotion-ready && pnpm test:release-sandbox:promotion-ready
scripts.check:release-sandbox: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm pack:release-sandbox && pnpm test:release-sandbox && pnpm test:release-sandbox:bundle-parity && pnpm check:release-sandbox:promotion-ready && node dist/release-sandbox-inspect-cli.js
scripts.check:release-shadow: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm pack:release-shadow && pnpm test:release-shadow && pnpm promotion-ready:release-shadow && pnpm test:release-shadow:promotion-ready && pnpm inspect:release-shadow
scripts.check:release-root-staging: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm plan:release-root-staging && pnpm apply:release-root-staging && pnpm diff:release-root-staging && pnpm test:release-root-staging && pnpm inspect:release-root-staging
scripts.check:release-root-promotion: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm apply:release-root-staging && pnpm plan:release-root-promotion && pnpm apply:release-root-promotion && pnpm diff:release-root-promotion && pnpm test:release-root-promotion && pnpm test:release-root-promotion:activation && pnpm test:release-root-promotion:promotion && pnpm promotion-ready:release-root-promotion && pnpm test:release-root-promotion:ready && pnpm inspect:release-root-promotion
scripts.check:release-target: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm apply:release-target && pnpm test:release-target
scripts.check:release-handoff: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm release-handoff && pnpm test:release-handoff
scripts.check:release-rehearsal: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm release-rehearsal && pnpm test:release-rehearsal
scripts.check:candidate: pnpm typecheck:local && pnpm test:parity && pnpm test:runtime-parity && pnpm test:combined-smoke && pnpm test:combined:e2e && pnpm check:preflight && pnpm check:release-candidate && pnpm check:release-sandbox
scripts.test:release-sandbox: pnpm build:entrypoint && node --test dist/release-sandbox-smoke.test.js dist/release-sandbox-parity.test.js dist/release-sandbox-activation.test.js dist/release-sandbox-promotion.test.js dist/release-sandbox-promotion-ready.test.js
scripts.test:release-shadow: pnpm build:entrypoint && node --test dist/release-shadow-smoke.test.js dist/release-shadow-parity.test.js dist/release-shadow-activation.test.js dist/release-shadow-promotion-ready.test.js
scripts.test:candidate: pnpm test:runtime-parity && pnpm test:combined-smoke && pnpm test:combined:e2e
scripts.typecheck:local: pnpm typecheck:shared && pnpm typecheck:api && pnpm typecheck:web && pnpm typecheck:entrypoint

description: Unified control-plane source boundary with transitional API and web entrypoints
